Saturn in the North-East is 2nd to North-Aries is East where there
is Mercury and Dragon Tail in the same degrees. Hence the
native's work is connected with soft, thread and wire (Dragon
Tail).

82 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Mercury is defeated by the inimical planet Dragon tail, and this
indicates that Saturn cannot enjoy benefits from the defeated
Mercury.
Or in other words. Mercury and Mars have interchanged. A per
interchange Saturn+Mercury+Dragon Tail is indicated. After
interchange SATURN+MARS+D. TAIL. Therefore, the native's
businessis connected with soft/yam produced by machines or is
in similar. Saturn will have to suffer due to obstructions from the
Dragon Tail and the Mars. Therefore the native cannot enjoy
success in any business line. But Jupiter is also in the East, thus
indicating that the native can do some independent business, but
it not would beneficial to him.
